strengths: Nearly two decades of full-stack delivery, currently hands-on with the exact core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK) at Optilyz and re:cinq
Active AI-agent development experience at re:cinq — building MCP code generators and agentic-workflow frameworks — directly matching the role's rarest requirement
Deep testing and craftsmanship pedigree: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development at RIDE, authored test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and taught multi-day testing courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed, though extensive Node.js backend work suggests a short ramp-up
Kotlin is absent and Java experience is dated/secondary, relevant only to the role's secondary stack
Frontend history leans on Ember.js; React exposure is documented but less extensive
response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the 6+ years requirement with roughly 18 years of professional full-stack work, including recent production experience in the role's primary stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS — at Optilyz and re:cinq. His current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work directly satisfies the hardest-to-source requirement, and his demonstrated polyglot range (TypeScript, Java, C/C++, D, Swift, PHP) plus Docker/Kubernetes deployment experience maps well to an internal-tooling environment that values picking the right tool per job. A career-long emphasis on testability, TDD, code reviews, and knowledge-sharing — including founding and operating an open-source geo-data platform end to end — signals exactly the ownership, quality focus, and collaboration the role calls for; the gaps (Nest.js, Kotlin) are narrow framework-level deltas well within reach of someone with this breadth.
